## Analysts compare Marvell and Nvidia revenue trends as AI silicon competition intensifies

The emergence of MRVL as an NVDA comparable in AI revenue trend analysis reflects growing buy-side interest in custom silicon alternatives; relevant to thesis differentiation between ASIC-driven (MRVL) and GPU-driven (NVDA) AI infrastructure positioning.

- Coverage frames MRVL and NVDA as comparable AI-exposed companies worth tracking side by side on revenue trends.
- No specific figures, growth rates, or analytical conclusions are stated in the headline.
- The framing signals both names are now positioned as core AI infrastructure plays in the investor narrative.
- No directional recommendation or outcome can be drawn from the headline alone.
